raiz.texto: Aurelia claims operational priority based on first-arrival activation rights and majority funding contribution. Demands exclusive control of life support systems management and veto authority over habitat modifications. Proposes that other crews limit their presence to maintain safety margins, with Aurelia retaining full crew complement. Argues that its life support engineer is indispensable and that allowing unqualified personnel to access critical systems risks everyone's survival. Considers any arrangement that places Aurelian systems under shared command authority a fundamental threat to operational safety, given that its life support engineer alone holds end-to-end systems certification.
